title: OpenAI Vision
description: A component that connects to OpenAI's vision-capable models for image analysis,
OCR, visual understanding, and scene description. Supports GPT-4o and GPT-4 Turbo models
with multimodal capabilities. Features robust error handling, automatic image processing,
and flexible prompt configuration for a wide range of vision use cases.

input.description: Image to analyze with OpenAI Vision models

output.description: Text analysis of the image content

input.description: Image documents to analyze with OpenAI Vision models

output.description: Text analysis of each image document with original metadata (frame number, timestamp) preserved

gpt-4-turbo.title: GPT-4 Turbo - High Quality Vision (128K tokens)

image_vision_openai.apikey.title: API Key
image_vision_openai.apikey.description: OpenAI API key. Get one at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys

vision.systemPrompt.title: System Instructions
vision.systemPrompt.description: Define the model's role and behavior for image analysis

vision.prompt.title: Analysis Prompt
vision.prompt.description: Describe what you want to analyze or extract from the image

image_vision_openai.profile.title: Vision Model
image_vision_openai.profile.description: Select the OpenAI vision model to use
